/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc --sysroot=/opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libcrb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/crb_ros_msg__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/crb_ros_msg/msg/detail/upper_joint_data__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/rootfs_2204_aarch64/opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
